title: Checkout API 502 after deployment
description: Checkout API is returning 502 after deployment and users cannot complete payment.

title: Kubernetes pod crash loop
description: The orders pod is in CrashLoopBackOff after a new image rollout. Restart count keeps increasing.

title: Linux VM disk full
description: Linux VM disk usage is 96 percent and the application reports write failures.

title: DNS resolution failure
description: Users in one region cannot resolve api.contoso.internal. Some resolvers return NXDOMAIN.

title: Azure VM unreachable
description: Azure VM became unreachable by SSH after deployment. Health probe is failing.
